overview.description: Joint research department of CIIRC CTU and Faculty of Mechanical Engineering focused on industrial production, automation, and robotics
overview.description_long: The IPA (Industrial Production and Automation) department is a joint department of CIIRC (Czech Institute of Informatics, Robotics and Cybernetics) at CTU Prague and the Faculty of Mechanical Engineering. Research covers theory of time-delayed systems and their applications, robotics, production machines and processes. The department runs four research groups: Machine and Process Control (MPC), Efficient Production (EFP), Simulation Optimization and Measurement (SOM), and a Prototype Workshop (PRO). Research results are applied across industrial production processes in the Czech Republic and abroad, including power generation and heavy industry. The group also co-runs the Testbed for Industry 4.0 at CIIRC.
overview.tagline: Research in industrial production, automation, and robotics at CIIRC CTU Prague

history.origin_story: Joint department of CIIRC CTU Prague and the Faculty of Mechanical Engineering (Fakulta strojního inženýrství ČVUT). Part of CIIRC, which was established in 2013.

key_milestones.event: CIIRC CTU Prague established; IPA is one of its founding departments
RICAIP (Research and Innovation Centre on Advanced Industrial Production) EU-funded project launched
Hosts Industry 4.0 open days and Testbed for Industry 4.0 lower-level operations

financials.parent_company: CIIRC CTU Prague / Czech Technical University in Prague

leadership.name: Michael Valášek
leadership.role: Head of Department / Head of SOM group

leadership.name: Petr Kolář
leadership.role: Deputy Head / Head of EFP group

partnerships: Faculty of Mechanical Engineering CTU Prague

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Academic research group at CIIRC CTU Prague; not a commercial entity subject to AGI commoditization pressure.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: University research group funded by grants (TAČR, GAČR, EU); not exposed to commercial market risk.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Funded through Czech and EU grant programs (GAČR, TAČR, RICAIP EU) and CTU institutional budget; academic funding model.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Academic research department within CTU Prague's CIIRC; risk assessment framework does not apply to public university research groups.

metadata.notes: IPA = Oddělení průmyslové výroby a automatizace. Joint department of CIIRC CTU and Faculty of Mechanical Engineering. Address: Jugoslávských partyzánů 1580/3, Praha 5 Dejvice. No CNAIP page found.
